historical_context.location: Deck of a New Bedford Whaling Ship, North Atlantic
historical_context.atmosphere: Morning mist, salty air, industrial maritime labor

lead_subject.name: The New Bedford Seaman
lead_subject.features: Messy black hair, blue eyes, uneven skin texture with salt-crust and fine wrinkles around eyes
lead_subject.pose: Direct candid look, slight squint, unposed, unsmiling
lead_subject.attire: Rough wool indigo peacoat, pilled texture, faded neckerchief, stained wool cap

secondary_subject.name: The Veteran Whaler
secondary_subject.features: Deep-set squinting eyes, tangled grey beard, sun-leathered skin, broken nose
secondary_subject.action: Standing in profile, looking away, holding a short wooden pipe with a wisp of smoke
secondary_subject.attire: Canvas apron with oil stains over a coarse hand-sewn flannel shirt

tertiary_subject.name: The Cabin Boy
tertiary_subject.features: Lean, smudged face, chapped lips, tired expression
tertiary_subject.action: Dragging a heavy wooden bucket in the soft-focus background
tertiary_subject.attire: Overly large, worn-out sweater, visible patches on the sleeves

cinematography.camera_lens: Vintage Daguerreotype bellows camera, 100mm focal length, significant edge-to-edge softness
cinematography.lighting: Harsh, low-angle morning sun partially diffused by heavy sea fog, creating complex flare and lens haze
cinematography.composition: Asymmetrical, candid street-photography style, slightly off-balance to simulate ship motion

aesthetic_specs.textures: Wet oak wood grain, rusted iron deck hardware with flaking paint, coarse wool fibers, skin pores clogged with sweat and oil, authentic film scratches
aesthetic_specs.color_palette: Weathered greys, deep indigo-blue, charcoal, sun-bleached browns, oxidized metal blacks
aesthetic_specs.film_style: 1860s Daguerreotype, silver-nitrate metallic sheen, authentic chemical staining, light leak on the left edge, micro-cracks in the emulsion

master_prompt: A candid, gritty 1860s Daguerreotype photograph of three whalers on the deck of a wooden ship. The 21-year-old lead Seaman is in the foreground, his blue eyes narrowed against the sun, his light skin showing real salt-spray residue and oily texture. His black hair is damp and messy. Beside him, a 55-year-old whaler with a grizzled grey beard is caught in a natural profile, looking away. A cabin boy is seen as a blurry, unposed figure in the background. The scene is shot with an authentic mid-19th century bellows camera, resulting in natural lens haze, edge softness, and uneven exposure. The wooden deck is realistically wet and dirty with flaking paint and rust. The image is a genuine historical document, avoiding all digital smoothness and artificial symmetry.
negative_prompt: ai-generated, rendering, digital art, 3d, smoothed skin, symmetrical face, studio lighting, clean clothes, vibrant colors, neon, plastic, modern technology, sharpened, watermark, text
